strengths: 13+ years of full-stack experience spanning web, mobile, desktop and embedded systems
Direct TypeScript/Node.js and React production experience at Optilyz and RIDE Capital
Current exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling at re:cinq
concerns: No demonstrated Nest.js experience and no mention of Vitest, Playwright, or Jest despite being core required frameworks
Heavy career investment in DLang (a niche language not in the stack) across multiple roles, suggesting potential misalignment with the modern TS/Nest.js ecosystem
No evidence of Kotlin experience and limited recent Java work; cloud platform exposure (AWS/GCP/Azure) and Kubernetes depth are only briefly hinted at without specifics

key_factors.factor: Missing Nest.js and named testing frameworks
No Kotlin experience for secondary backend stack
Significant focus on niche DLang over primary stack

response.justification: While the candidate brings broad full-stack tenure and some relevant TypeScript/React exposure, the resume shows no evidence of Nest.js, Vitest, Playwright, or Kotlin — four explicitly listed requirements. A substantial portion of the candidate's deep technical identity centers on DLang and self-directed open-source GIS work, which does not map to the role's enterprise TypeScript/Nest.js automation tooling focus. Cloud and container experience is mentioned only in passing without depth, and the AI-agent work is recent and thin. On balance, the resume reads as a generalist craftsman whose specialization sits outside the team's primary stack.
